cues.label: Text enters
cues.headline: Raw text is still outside the model
cues.narration: The prompt starts as human-readable text, but the transformer cannot consume text directly.

cues.label: Tokenizer contract
cues.headline: The tokenizer is a fixed contract
cues.narration: The tokenizer vocabulary decides which text pieces map to which integer IDs.

cues.label: IDs handed off
cues.headline: Token IDs are addresses for model weights
cues.narration: The resulting integers are not meaning by themselves. They are addresses the embedding table can use.

cues.label: Model boundary
cues.headline: The transformer starts after this handoff
cues.narration: The transformer receives model-owned numeric state, not raw text. This explains how tokenizer and transformer relate.
